additional_rules.description: GMCC Diamond Express — Jumbo Express program available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes AK).
additional_rules.see_guidelines: Refer to GMCC Diamond Express flyer and training materials for current LTV, FICO, and reserve requirements.

general_notes: GMCC Diamond Express — Jumbo Express Non-QM program.
Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes Alaska).
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. Primary, investment, and second home eligible.
Specific LTV, FICO, reserves, and DTI limits vary — refer to GMCC Diamond Express guidelines.
